creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text: Then it sounds like you need to fix building print/qpdf before trying to build print/cups-filters. I think I ran into this problem myself and had to remove print/qpdf and then install it again. I believe it cannot rebuild itself properly when already installed, which is a shame. In any case, it does seem to be that this isn't a cups-filters problem but rather a qpdf problem that just compounds onto cups-filters.
